title: YCreatives Flowers
description: Flowers and flower-themed Blocks in 32 Pixels
body:
# **Flowers and flower-themed Blocks in 32 Pixels**


**36 Flowers:**

- Different big and small flowers like Orchids, Pansies, Violas, Marigolds.. and many more (Community-Wishes are welcomed)

![YCFlowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c8b97d866d04372cef271715ed1275e78658c5_0.webp)



**9 Carpets:**

- Different big sized square and round carpets

![YCCarpets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaaab4e1e396bda2d50eb4b4ee833c645f0b4935_0.webp)

 

Have fun.

-- Yvecreatives
